sections.heading: Runtime Entry Point Renamed
sections.body: gsd-tools.js has been renamed to gsd-tools.cjs to match the CommonJS module system. The installer automatically removes the old file during upgrade.

sections.heading: Modular CLI Architecture
sections.body: The monolithic CLI has been split into 16 focused modules in lib/. The command interface is unchanged -- all existing commands work identically.

sections.heading: Config Field Rename: depth to granularity
sections.body: The 'depth' config field has been renamed to 'granularity'. Run /gsdr:upgrade-project to migrate your project config automatically.

sections.heading: Manifest Version 2 with Migrations Array
sections.body: manifest_version has been bumped from 1 to 2 to support declarative config migrations. Run /gsdr:upgrade-project to update your project config.

sections.heading: Hook Field Validation
sections.body: Invalid hook entries in settings.json are now validated and stripped to prevent Claude Code's schema validator from silently discarding the entire settings file.

sections.heading: Cross-Platform Code Detection
sections.body: Project initialization now detects language and build files using a cross-platform approach (no Unix find dependency), supporting 16+ build/package file types.
